title: Luxury Character Profile Concept Poster AI
sourceTitle: Luxury Character Profile Concept Poster AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Luxury pink-and-white character concept poster for Nyra Vale, designed as a premium magazine profile with edgy modern fashion energy. Subject: original adult woman with long silky dark hair, subtle pink highlights, calm confidence, and a mysterious aura wears black and pink hybrid streetwear-idol outfit with glossy textures, lace details, and metallic accents, holding a confident calm presence with mysterious aura and original fictional identity. Scene: Vertical profile-poster layout with large hero portrait, sleek profile panel, trait bars, accessories module, dark-pink glow accents, and precise magazine grid alignment. Composition: Top section pairs hero portrait with refined English profile panel; middle and lower sections show traits, accessories, outfit details, and visual identity modules without overcrowding the face. Signature Elements: Preserved luxury character profile concept poster source structure, fixed composition hierarchy, stable visual rhythm, and reusable content controls remain consistent across generated variants. Fixed source details: Age Height Style: Age 23 / Height 170 cm / Style: Dark Elegance. Style: Ultra-detailed 4K glossy magazine character design poster with cinematic lighting, sharp focus, luxurious pink-white aesthetic, black-and-pink fashion edge, and modern editorial UI structure. Color Palette: Luxury pink, clean white, black fashion accents, metallic details, neon pink glow, soft skin tones, and balanced high-contrast dark areas. Lighting: Soft but dramatic editorial light with neon pink rim glow, glossy material highlights, and clean facial separation from the profile panel. Typography: Profile text includes Nyra Vale, Design a high-resolution vertical character concept poster with a luxurious pink and white aesthetic that blends elegance with edgy modern fashion., short bio She does not follow trends, she sets them. Quiet strength, sharp vision, and a presence that speaks without words., and trait bars for Confidence / Creativity / Discipline / Charisma / Emotional Depth; all text stays refined, English, and readable. Restrictions: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure.

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。
